name: agent-browser-migration
title: Migrate browser automation from Playwright to agent-browser CLI
description: Replace Playwright's in-process CDP page operations with agent-browser CLI (Vercel Labs). Retain browser-launch.ts for Chrome discovery and CDP startup.
creator: zbl

grill_decisions.motivation: Playwright heavy + agent-browser design philosophy better
grill_decisions.core_value: dynamic ref + accessibility tree, not fixed DOM selectors
